title: Gloom Raiders
description: Add six new illager called:Nun,Earl,Dramatist,Headsman,Psychic,SpellSword,and many mobs or items  about them.Due to technical reasons,in-game American English will no longer be translated(1.0.6),and British English translations will be provided instead.
body:
# [About the Mod]
This mod primarily adds six illagers—the Nun,Earl,Dramatist,Headsman,PsychicM&W and SpellSword—along with related items and creatures. They only spawn during raid events.

## [Main Mobs Introduction]

Nun: An illager capable of protecting nearby illagers, effective against the undead. She can enlarge herself and, under certain conditions, deal massive damage.

Earl: Excels at bloodsucking, skilled at impaling enemies with stakes for heavy damage. He can summon vampire bats and transform into an undead vampire.

Dramatist: Weak in solo combat, but can enchant illagers' weapons and is adept at creating dramatic characters to aid in battle.

Headsman: Possesses strong growth potential, combines pursuit abilities, and can summon guillotines especially effective against non-undead mobs.

Psychic(M&W):Exceling at using superpowers,esecially the electric discharge superpower(can't make villiager transfer),and possesses exceptional control capabilities.

Additionally, there are many interesting mobs related to the above, such as the Priest and the Intelligencer.

Priest: The Priest, a friendly mob that is fragile yet capable of providing buff effects and dealing massive magical damage.

Intelligencer: A friendly mob with strong survival and crowd-control abilities.

Snowman Armor: A friendly mob that excels at close-quarters combat and can deal heavy damage.
[Notes]

A Note from the Creator: Please note that all content in this mod is entirely based on the creator's stereotypes and anime inspirations, and is not related to real-world religious or cultural beliefs. We kindly ask players to treat these elements lightly. This mod comes with built-in Chinese localization. Starting from version 1.0.6, the English translation has been changed from American English to British English.

As the author is still a student, the current version of the mod contains limited content but will be updated irregularly.

Future versions will introduce more diverse and engaging mobs, mechanics, and features. Finally, please remember to download GeckoLib as a required API.
